negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing EnhancedCallEvent construction with u64 overflow rejection; no local scheduler event parser was found in port or dependency repos.
related_but_insufficient_code: This overlaps invariant 100 but is kept as a separate terminal gap because it specifically names EnhancedCallEvent state construction.

rationale: The current scheduler contract event parser calls u256_to_u64 for callId across parsed event variants and for executionIndex or totalExecutions where those event values are stored in the u64 execution_index field; u256_to_u64 maps overflow to EventDecodingError.
statement: Scheduler event decoding must reject callId, executionIndex, and totalExecutions values greater than u64::MAX instead of truncating them while constructing EnhancedCallEvent state.
suggested_falsification_tests: Decode each EnhancedCallEvent-producing Scheduler event with oversized callId/executionIndex/totalExecutions and assert rejection.
Assert no event with oversized identifiers reaches u64 state.
summary: Scheduler event ID overflow rejection is absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Current port lacks EnhancedCallEvent and u256_to_u64 overflow checks.
title: Scheduler event IDs reject u64 overflow
